entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop being studied for pest resistance and management.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International research center conducting studies on groundnut pests in India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic location where the research and pest identification occur.

entities.name: ARTHROPODS
entities.description: Groupings of organisms identified as major field pests of groundnuts.

entities.name: PEST CONTROL
entities.description: Contemporary options and strategies for managing groundnut pests.

entities.name: INSECTICIDE USAGE
entities.description: The application of insecticides, which researchers aim to rationalize.

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: A trait to be incorporated into groundnut cultivars to reduce pest impact.

entities.name: TERMITES
entities.description: A specific arthropod identified as a major field pest of groundnuts.

entities.name: FRANKLINIELLA SCHULTZEI
entities.description: A thrips species and virus vector that is a major field pest of groundnuts.

entities.name: SPODOPTERA LITURA
entities.description: The tobacco cutworm, a major field pest of groundnuts.

entities.name: APROAEREMA MODICELLA
entities.description: The groundnut leafminer, a major field pest of groundnuts.

entities.name: CARYEDON SERRATUS
entities.description: A bruchid identified as a potential pest of stored groundnuts in India.

entities.name: TRIBOLIUM CASTANEUM
entities.description: The rust-red flour beetle, a postharvest pest of groundnut kernels.

entities.name: CORCYRA CEPHALONICA
entities.description: The rice moth, a postharvest pest of groundnut kernels.

entities.name: EPHESTIA CAUTELLA
entities.description: The warehouse moth, a postharvest pest of groundnut kernels.

entities.name: ICRISAT TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Specially developed methods used to test groundnut genotypes for resistance to postharvest pests.
